title: helichrysum oligochaetum
intro: Helichrysum oligochaetum, also known as Cape Barley or Everlasting Herb, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum oligochaetum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Helichrysum oligochaetum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
